key_points: Electricity is a form of energy that allows devices to work
An electric circuit is a closed path through which electric current flows
Basic components of a circuit include a cell, wires, switch and bulb
A bulb glows only when the circuit is closed
Conductors allow electric current to pass through them
examples: Simple circuit: Cell → Wire → Switch → Bulb
Switch ON forms a closed circuit and the bulb glows
Switch OFF forms an open circuit and the bulb does not glow
Copper wire is a conductor used in circuits
formulas: Electric circuit → A closed path that allows current to flow
Closed circuit → Complete path where current flows
Open circuit → Broken path where current cannot flow
exam_tips: Remember the basic components of an electric circuit
Learn the difference between open and closed circuits
Know examples of conductors and insulators
